Dedos also called Ghedos is the personification of death

Based on Abel and Papa Ghede ([[:en:Baron_Samedi|Baron Samedi]]) in Vodou who is often identified as Abel

Name changed from Ghedos to Dedos over cultural appropriation concerns, concerns with difficulties in audiences understanding, and due to the shift of his character to being much more unsympathetic making the Papa Ghede comparison more sensitive
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
== Merged content ==
NOTES FOR {{Q|Q9}}
[[Category:First 250 notes]][[Category:Pages]]
